global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with food-related icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery service with a special offer.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Two simple line-drawn food icons, resembling a plate and a bowl, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Another line-drawn food icon, possibly a drink, positioned next to the first two icons.

elements.label: Circle icon
elements.description: A small circular icon, likely representing a button or a dot, located below the food icons.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small, unidentifiable icon located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' in a dark color, centrally positioned.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: The logo 'PlateSprint' displayed in a bold font at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge in a contrasting color, positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and playful, food delivery service, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: PlateSprint, SALE, Your cravings, delivered, €9.99, Shop now
